name: call-codex
description: Mac-first Codex plugin for app-server-powered calls between Codex threads.

interface.shortDescription: Open app-server calls between Codex threads
interface.longDescription: CALL-CODEX is a macOS-first Codex plugin for super-user multi-thread calls. A main thread can boot a local app-server, create worker threads, send targeted messages, track status, and preserve a local transcript.
defaultPrompt: Call Codex and spin up workers for this repo.
Open a call with backend, tests, and reviewer.
Show call status and who is on the line.
